search.title: Search Control Plane
search.subtitle: Module-owned admin surface for search diagnostics, scoped rebuilds, and PostgreSQL FTS inspection.
search.error.invalidSettingsJson: Settings config must be valid JSON.
search.error.loadBootstrap: Failed to load search bootstrap data
search.error.loadLagging: Failed to load lagging search diagnostics
search.error.loadConsistency: Failed to load search consistency diagnostics
search.error.settingsConfigRootObject: Settings config root must be a JSON object.
search.error.serializeMergedSettings: Failed to serialize merged search settings config
search.overview.activeEngine.title: Active engine
search.overview.activeEngine.detail: Effective search settings for the current tenant.
search.overview.fallbackEngine.title: Fallback engine
search.overview.fallbackEngine.detail: Used when an external engine is configured but unavailable.
search.overview.availableEngines.title: Available engines
search.overview.availableEngines.detail: Only connectors installed in the runtime appear here.
search.overview.updatedAt.title: Updated at
search.overview.updatedAt.detail: Timestamp of the effective settings record.
search.overview.documents.title: Documents
search.overview.documents.detail: Total search documents in rustok-search storage.
search.overview.publicDocs.title: Public docs
search.overview.publicDocs.detail: Published documents visible to storefront search.
search.overview.staleDocs.title: Stale docs
search.overview.staleDocs.detail: Documents where indexed_at lags behind source updated_at.
search.overview.missingDocs.title: Missing docs
search.overview.missingDocs.detail: Source rows that should exist in search_documents but do not.
search.overview.orphanedDocs.title: Orphaned docs
search.overview.orphanedDocs.detail: Search documents that no longer have a matching source row.
search.overview.maxLag.title: Max lag
search.overview.maxLag.detail: Worst-case lag between source update and search projection.
search.settings.title: Engine Settings
search.settings.subtitle: Save the effective search engine selection and JSON config for the current tenant. Only engines installed in the runtime appear here.
search.relevance.title: Relevance Settings
search.relevance.subtitle: Structured editor for ranking defaults and filter presets. These values are merged back into `search_settings.config` on save.
search.relevance.previewPresetsHint: Each item supports: key, label, entity_types, source_modules, statuses, ranking_profile.
search.relevance.storefrontPresetsHint: Presets drive public tabs and default filter scopes for `storefrontSearch`.
search.rebuild.title: Scoped Rebuild
search.rebuild.subtitle: Queue tenant-wide or scoped rebuilds. `content` and `product` rebuild the whole slice when target ID is empty, or a single entity when target ID is provided.
search.playground.title: Search Preview
search.playground.subtitle: Runs the current PostgreSQL FTS preview path over rustok-search documents.
search.playground.empty: Run a preview query to inspect FTS results, facets, and effective engine output.
search.analytics.title: Search Analytics
search.analytics.subtitle: CTR, abandonment, zero-result, slow-query analysis, and query-intelligence candidates over the recent query log window.
search.analytics.laggingDocs.title: Lagging docs
search.analytics.laggingDocs.detail: Documents where projection timestamps are behind source updates.
search.analytics.missingDocs.title: Missing docs
search.analytics.missingDocs.detail: Expected projection rows that are absent from search storage.
search.analytics.orphanedDocs.title: Orphaned docs
search.analytics.orphanedDocs.detail: Projection rows without a matching content/product source row.
search.analytics.maxLag.title: Max lag
search.analytics.newestIndexed.title: Newest indexed
search.analytics.newestIndexed.detail: Most recent index write in rustok-search storage.
search.analytics.oldestIndexed.title: Oldest indexed
search.analytics.laggingSubtitle: Raw diagnostics for the most stale documents in search storage.
search.analytics.consistencySubtitle: Missing projections and orphaned search documents compared to current content/product source state.
search.analytics.summary.window.title: Window
search.analytics.summary.queries.title: Queries
search.analytics.summary.queries.detail: All logged search queries in the current window.
search.analytics.summary.ctr.title: CTR
search.analytics.summary.ctr.detail: Share of eligible successful queries that received at least one click.
search.analytics.summary.abandonment.det: Eligible successful queries that ended without any tracked click.
Share of successful queries that returned no results.
search.analytics.summary.slowQueryRate.d: Share of successful queries at or above the current slow-query threshold.
search.analytics.summary.totalClicks.det: All tracked result clicks in the current window.
search.analytics.summary.abandonedQuerie: Successful queries older than the click-eval window with no clicks.
search.analytics.summary.uniqueQueries.d: Distinct normalized queries observed in the window.
search.analytics.topQueries.title: Top Queries
search.analytics.topQueries.subtitle: Most frequent successful queries across admin and storefront search.
search.analytics.zeroResultQueries.title: Zero-Result Queries
search.analytics.zeroResultQueries.subti: Queries that repeatedly return nothing and are likely candidates for synonyms, redirects, or content gaps.
search.analytics.zeroResultQueries.empty: No zero-result queries recorded in the current window.
search.analytics.slowQueries.title: Slow Queries
search.analytics.slowQueries.subtitle: Queries whose average execution time meets or exceeds the current slow-query threshold.
search.analytics.slowQueries.empty: No slow queries detected in the current window.
search.analytics.lowCtrQueries.title: Low CTR Queries
search.analytics.lowCtrQueries.subtitle: Frequent queries whose result sets are not attracting clicks.
search.analytics.lowCtrQueries.empty: No low-CTR queries detected in the current window.
search.analytics.abandonmentQueries.subt: Successful queries that tend to end without any click.
search.analytics.abandonmentQueries.empt: No abandoned high-volume queries detected in the current window.
search.analytics.intelligence.title: Query Intelligence
search.analytics.intelligence.subtitle: Queries that most likely need synonyms, redirects, pinning, or ranking adjustments.
search.analytics.intelligence.empty: No query-intelligence candidates surfaced in the current window.
search.analytics.lagging.empty: No lagging documents detected. Search projection is currently caught up.
search.analytics.consistency.empty: No missing or orphaned search documents detected. Projection consistency is healthy.
search.preview.title: Preview Results
search.preview.noTargetUrl: No target URL is available for this result yet.
search.table.title: Title
search.dictionary.title: Search Dictionaries
search.dictionary.subtitle: Tenant-owned stop words, synonyms, and exact-query pin rules. These dictionaries apply to both admin preview and storefront search on the shared backend contract.
search.dictionary.error.invalidPinnedPos: Pinned position must be a positive integer.
search.dictionary.error.savePinRule: Failed to save pinned result rule
search.dictionary.synonyms.title: Synonyms
search.dictionary.synonyms.subtitle: Expand exact tokens into equivalent search terms.
search.dictionary.synonymGroups.title: Synonym Groups
search.dictionary.synonymGroups.subtitle: Each group expands all included terms as equivalent tokens.
search.dictionary.stopWords.title: Stop Words
search.dictionary.stopWords.subtitle: Remove low-signal tokens before FTS execution.
search.dictionary.stopWords.tableSubtitl: Terms removed from the effective FTS query.
search.dictionary.pinRules.title: Pinned Results
search.dictionary.pinRules.subtitle: Pin an existing search document for an exact normalized query.
search.dictionary.pinRules.tableSubtitle: Exact normalized queries that promote specific documents to chosen positions.
search.dictionary.pinRules.empty: No pinned query rules configured yet.
